items.title: Stocks to Watch Monday Recap: Boeing, Live Nation, Moderna, Roche
items.description: ↗️ Boeing (BA), Honeywell (HON), Lockheed Martin (LMT), Northrop Grumman (NOC), RTX (RTX): President Trump said major weapons makers agreed to raise munitions production after meeting with him. Shares in Boeing sold off, while other defense stocks were little changed.

items.title: Boeing (BA) Stock Falls Amid Market Uptick: What Investors Need to Know
items.description: Boeing (BA) reached $225 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -2.64% change compared to its last close.

items.title: Democrats threaten more Iran war powers votes, call for Hegseth, Rubio to testify
items.description: Democrats are vowing to interrupt normal order in the Senate unless Pete Hegseth and Marco Rubio testify publicly.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains As Trump Says Iran War Is 'Very Complete;' Pharma Stock Dives (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index came off lows on the stock market today. Oil prices surged on the U.S.-Iran war. Nvidia outperformed and Hims popped.

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The Dow bounced from a loss of almost 900 points to posting a nearly 240-point gain on Monday after Trump indicated an end may be in sight for the Iran war.
